titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Mufaddal Ibn Umar
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Mufaddal Ibn Umar

segments: ه عن المفضّل بن عمر فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رحمه اللّه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن المفضّل بن عمر الجعفيّ الكوفيّ و هو مولى‌.
arabic.text: ه عن المفضّل بن عمر فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رحمه اللّه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن المفضّل بن عمر الجعفيّ الكوفيّ و هو مولى‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Mufaddal ibn Umar has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Al-Hasan ibn Mattil Al-Daqqaq, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Al-Mufaddal ibn Umar Al-Ju'fi Al-Kufi, who was a freed servant (mawla).
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Mufaddal ibn Umar has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Al-Hasan ibn Mattil Al-Daqqaq, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Al-Mufaddal ibn Umar Al-Ju'fi Al-Kufi, who was a freed servant (mawla).
